evals.prompt: 帮我生成一张白底的商品主图，产品是一个黑色真皮手提包，要求高端大气
evals.expected_output: Should use generate with --template hero, produce a professional product image with white background

evals.prompt: I have a product photo but the background is messy. Can you clean it up and put it on a pure white background for my Shopify store?
evals.expected_output: Should use refine with --template bg-white on the user's image file

evals.prompt: 我需要做一批电商详情页的图片，包括主图、细节图、和一张16:9的Banner，产品是一款蓝牙耳机
evals.expected_output: Should run multiple generate commands with different templates (hero, detail, banner) for the bluetooth earbuds
